summary.zh-CN: 本版本改进聊天附件预览、工具活动展示、Claude/Codex runtime 模型兼容和 marketplace 详情恢复。
summary.en-US: This release improves chat attachment previews, tool activity display, Claude/Codex runtime model compatibility, and marketplace detail recovery.

title.zh-CN: 聊天附件进入工作区预览
title.en-US: Chat attachments open in the workspace

body.zh-CN: 文件附件可以直接打开到右侧工作区预览，不必跳出到新的浏览器窗口。
body.en-US: File attachments can open directly in the workspace side preview instead of a new browser window.

body.zh-CN: 图片附件支持全屏灯箱查看，适合放大检查截图、设计稿和生成图片。
body.en-US: Image attachments can open in a fullscreen lightbox for inspecting screenshots, designs, and generated images.

title.zh-CN: Claude Code 支持 Runtime default

body.zh-CN: Claude Code 会话可以让 Claude Code 使用自己的配置、鉴权和默认模型。
body.en-US: Claude Code sessions can let Claude Code use its own configuration, authentication, and default model.

body.zh-CN: 推理、工具调用、文件和目录操作会用更紧凑的状态行呈现。
body.en-US: Reasoning, tool calls, file work, and directory work use more compact status rows.

body.zh-CN: 图片预览按钮、关闭按钮和焦点状态更清楚，键盘操作时不会出现过重的焦点样式。
body.en-US: Image preview controls, close controls, and focus states are easier to read without heavy focus rings.

body.zh-CN: cron 卡片、marketplace 搜索、文档浏览器控件和共享表单字段在不同主题下更统一。
body.en-US: Cron cards, marketplace search, document browser controls, and shared form fields are more consistent across themes.

title.zh-CN: Codex runtime 默认模型兼容性

body.zh-CN: Codex runtime 在新的默认模型配置下不再容易出现空响应。
body.en-US: Codex runtime no longer tends to return empty responses with the newer runtime default model setup.

body.zh-CN: Marketplace skill 详情页刷新后会恢复文档内容，不再只留下不可用的详情 tab。
body.en-US: Marketplace skill detail pages restore document content after browser refreshes instead of leaving the detail tab unavailable.

title.zh-CN: Claude Code 配置来源更明确

body.zh-CN: 显式 NextClaw 模型继续使用隔离配置，Runtime default 不再覆盖 Claude Code 自己的配置。
body.en-US: Explicit NextClaw model choices keep isolated configuration, while Runtime default no longer overwrites Claude Code's own configuration.

body.zh-CN: 本版本不需要手动迁移。
这是 NPM stable patch 版本，可通过正常的 NextClaw NPM 安装或更新流程使用。
body.en-US: This is an NPM stable patch release available through the normal NextClaw NPM install or update flow.
